languages.text: В конце первого {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} боя это существо использует способность {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Безумная калибровка: благословение Нургла{/g} на Осквернителя. Ее эффект длится 3 раунда. Эту {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} нельзя использовать, если существо {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинуто{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушено{/g} или было {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}отброшено{/g}.
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Mad Calibration: Blessing of Nurgle{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or has been {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: В конце первого {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} боя это существо использует способность {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Безумная калибровка: благословение Нургла{/g} на Осквернителя. Ее эффект длится 3 раунда. Эту {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} нельзя использовать, если существо {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинуто{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушено{/g} или было {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}отброшено{/g}.

В конце первого {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} боя это существо использует способность {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Безумная калибровка: благословение Нургла{/g} на Осквернителя. Ее эффект длится 3 раунда. Эту {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} нельзя использовать, если существо {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинуто{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушено{/g} или было {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}отброшено{/g}.

languages.text: À la fin du premier {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, cette créature utilise sur le Profanateur {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Calibrage débridé : bénédiction de Nurgle{/g}, dont les effets durent 3 rounds. Cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} ne peut pas être déclenchée si la créature est {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}paralysée{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}étourdie{/g} ou si elle a été {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}repoussée{/g}.
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Mad Calibration: Blessing of Nurgle{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or has been {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: À la fin du premier {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, cette créature utilise sur le Profanateur {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Calibrage débridé : bénédiction de Nurgle{/g}, dont les effets durent 3 rounds. Cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} ne peut pas être déclenchée si la créature est {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}paralysée{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}étourdie{/g} ou si elle a été {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}repoussée{/g}.

languages.text: Bu yaratık, ilk {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raundun{/g} sonunda Kirleten üzerinde {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Çılgınca Kalibrasyon: Nurgle'ın Lütfu{/g} kullanır. Etkisi, 3 raunt sürer. Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyet{/g}; yaratık {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilmişse{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}sersemlemişse{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}itilmişse{/g} kullanılamaz.
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Mad Calibration: Blessing of Nurgle{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or has been {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: Bu yaratık, ilk {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raundun{/g} sonunda Kirleten üzerinde {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Çılgınca Kalibrasyon: Nurgle'ın Lütfu{/g} kullanır. Etkisi, 3 raunt sürer. Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyet{/g}; yaratık {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilmişse{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}sersemlemişse{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}itilmişse{/g} kullanılamaz.

languages.text: 第1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}结束时，该生物会对污染者使用{g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}疯狂校准：纳垢祝福{/g}，持续3轮。该生物若陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}或被{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}击退{/g}状态，则无法发动此{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}。
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Mad Calibration: Blessing of Nurgle{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or has been {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: 第1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}结束时，该生物会对污染者使用{g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}疯狂校准：纳垢祝福{/g}，持续3轮。该生物若陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}或被{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}击退{/g}状态，则无法发动此{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}。

languages.text: Al final del primer {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, esta criatura utiliza {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Calibración demencial: Bendición de Nurgle{/g} sobre el Profanador; su efecto dura 3 asaltos. Esta {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} no puede utilizarse si la criatura ha resultado {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribada{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdida{/g} o {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}empujada{/g}.
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Mad Calibration: Blessing of Nurgle{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or has been {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: Al final del primer {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, esta criatura utiliza {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Calibración demencial: Bendición de Nurgle{/g} sobre el Profanador; su efecto dura 3 asaltos. Esta {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} no puede utilizarse si la criatura ha resultado {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribada{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdida{/g} o {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}empujada{/g}.

languages.text: Am Ende der ersten {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} belegt diese Kreatur die Geißel mit {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Verrückte Kalibrierung: Nurgles Segen{/g}. Dieser Effekt bleibt 3 Runden lang bestehen. Diese {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} kann nicht eingesetzt werden, wenn die Kreatur {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}betäubt{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}zurückgestoßen{/g} wurde.
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Mad Calibration: Blessing of Nurgle{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or has been {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: Am Ende der ersten {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} belegt diese Kreatur die Geißel mit {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Verrückte Kalibrierung: Nurgles Segen{/g}. Dieser Effekt bleibt 3 Runden lang bestehen. Diese {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} kann nicht eingesetzt werden, wenn die Kreatur {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}betäubt{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}zurückgestoßen{/g} wurde.

languages.text: 1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}目の終わりに、このクリーチャーはデファイラーに3ラウンド続く{g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}狂気調整: ヌルゲの祝福{/g}を使う。この{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}は、クリーチャーが{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}仰向け{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}気絶{/g}、または{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}押し出された{/g}状態では使えない。
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}Mad Calibration: Blessing of Nurgle{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or has been {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: 1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}目の終わりに、このクリーチャーはデファイラーに3ラウンド続く{g|f:b63bc60b3a03483c9b0e284e365b6be3}狂気調整: ヌルゲの祝福{/g}を使う。この{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}は、クリーチャーが{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}仰向け{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}気絶{/g}、または{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}押し出された{/g}状態では使えない。
